message:
🐛 Fix duplicate notifications, alerts memo deps, filter analytics, loading indicator (#4876)

- #4855: Move notification dispatch logic outside React state updaters to
  prevent duplicate API calls when React replays updaters in Strict Mode /
  concurrent rendering. Both resolveAlert and unbatched createAlert now
  determine notification targets before entering setAlerts.

- #4864: Add a 30-second loading timeout safety net so isLoadingData
  auto-clears if the lazy-loaded AlertsDataFetcher never resolves (e.g.,
  chunk load failure), preventing the UI from getting stuck in a permanent
  loading state.

- #4865: Add analytics emit calls to toggleCluster, toggleSeverity, and
  toggleStatus in useGlobalFilters. Previously only bulk set operations
  (setSelectedClusters, etc.) triggered analytics, leaving individual
  toggle interactions untracked.

- #4868: Defer evaluateConditions heavy synchronous work to the next frame
  via setTimeout(0) so React can paint the isEvaluating=true loading state
  before the main thread is blocked by rule evaluation.

Fixes #4855, #4864, #4865, #4868

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
